mechanism: Historical analogues (3/3) show divergence resolves via equity vol rising, not rates vol compressing, because MOVE drivers (fiscal issuance, QT, BoJ) are structurally persistent while VIX suppressors (microstructure, vol-selling complex) are fragile. However, the Kalecki channel could make this time different.
regime_dependence: Conditional on the non-stationarity paradox: if microstructure has structurally changed, 3/3 analogue rate may not transfer; if Kalecki fiscal channel represents novel regime, divergence may persist indefinitely
